errors.mustBeTournamentAdmin: You must be a project admin to perform this action
errors.teamNotInTournament: Team is not part of this project

errors.onlyTournamentAdminsDeleteBroadcast: Only project administrators can delete broadcast messages

errors.teamAdminOrTournamentAdmin: You must be team admin or project admin
errors.addingTeamsProOnly: Adding existing teams is only available for PRO projects
errors.teamSportMustMatch: Team sport must match project sport

errors.playerAlreadyInAnotherTeam: This player is already registered on another team in this project
errors.teamMustHaveOneVenue: Team must have at least one venue
errors.teamMustHaveOfficialVenue: Team must have at least one official venue. Add another official venue first or change an alternate to official.
errors.teamMustHaveAlternateVenue: Team must have at least one alternate venue. Add another alternate first.
errors.nameOrFirstLastNameRequired: Name or first name + last name is required
errors.teamDoesNotParticipate: Team does not participate in this project
errors.categoryNotInTournament: Category does not belong to this project
errors.somePlayerIdsInvalid: Some player IDs do not belong to this team
errors.uploadFieldsRequired: type, fileBase64, fileName and mimeType are required
errors.onlyRequesterOrTeamAdminResend: Only the requester or team admin can resend the notification
errors.notParticipant: Not a participant of this conversation
errors.onlyMessageRelatedUsers: You can only message users related to you through a project (same team or project)
errors.passwordRequirements: Password does not meet security requirements
errors.emailMustMatchInvited: Email must match the invited address
errors.invalidOrExpiredResetLink: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one.
errors.resetLinkAlreadyUsed: This reset link has already been used. Please request a new one.
errors.resetLinkExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.homeAndAwayMustDiffer: Home and away team must be different
errors.bothTeamsMustBelong: Both teams must belong to this project
errors.suspendedMatchNotFound: Suspended match not found or does not belong to this project

errors.needTeamsForGroups: Need at least {{numGroups}} teams for {{numGroups}} groups
errors.groupNeedsTwoTeams: Group {{group}} has only {{count}} team(s). Each group needs at least 2.
errors.onlyManualMatchesDeletable: Only manually added matches after the base schedule can be deleted. Use "Delete and regenerate" to remove the entire schedule.
errors.cannotSuspendWithResult: Cannot suspend a match that has a recorded result
